creator: mezz7@cox.net
text:
Hello anray,

Do you want to take the maintainership of x11-wm/sawfish? We (FreeBSD  
GNOME Team) have agreed to give up the maintainership if you want it, so  
it means that you have the approve to poke with sawfish port.

Cheers,
Mezz


--

FreeBSD GNOME Team
http://www.FreeBSD.org/gnome/  -  gnome@FreeBSD.org
